title: RandomScale
description: 🎲 Every mob receives a random size whenever it spawns or is loaded into the world.
body:
## 🎲 RandomScale
**This data pack / mod adds a small feature that randomizes all spawned or loaded mobs in your world to a one-time size between 0.01 and 20.**

Each mob receives a random size only once. The ender dragon receives no random size (due to a minecraft bug). The player and items are unaffected.

![Mobs with different scales](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db7a0e79c6c3e57a5d437c7241cbb734579cb474.png)

## 📚 How to Install the Datapack
### 👤 Singleplayer
Drag the downloaded .zip file into the ```"\.minecraft\saves\YOURWORLD\datapacks"``` folder.
Now enter your world. You can check whether the datapack is enabled with /datapack list.
### 👥 Multiplayer (Server)
Drag the downloaded .zip file into the datapack folder, which is located in the default "world" folder.
Now join your server. You can check whether the datapack is enabled with /datapack list.

Enjoy!

## 📹 Videos
Videos created by Content Creators.
